info.title: CoutureCast HTTP API
info.description: Canonical HTTP contracts shared across API, web, mobile, and tests.

since.description: Fetch only events created after this ISO timestamp.

enum: Weather data is delayed. Check again shortly.

post.summary: Create an account with age verification
post.description: Evaluates the submitted birthdate, blocks signups for children under 13, and flags 13-15 year olds for guardian consent.

400.description: Signup payload failed validation or email is already registered

403.description: Birthdate indicates a child younger than thirteen

post.summary: Record guardian consent for a teen account
post.description: Captures guardian consent for compliance workflows and downstream audit/analytics handling.

403.description: Authenticated guardian does not match guardianId

get.summary: API health metadata for smoke tests and preview waiters

get.description: Returns unseen events plus the next cursor for polling fallback clients.

schema.description: Fetch only events created after this ISO timestamp.

parameters.description: Fetch only events created after this ISO timestamp.
parameters.name: since

200.description: Incremental polling result. Invalid query timestamps currently return a graceful payload instead of a 4xx.

post.summary: Invite a guardian for a teen account
post.description: Creates a signed seven-day invitation token, queues an invitation email, and stores the invitation for later acceptance.

400.description: Guardian invitation payload failed validation or the teen is not eligible

post.description: Validates the signed invitation token, links or creates the guardian account, records consent, and queues confirmation emails.

400.description: Guardian invitation token is invalid, expired, or already used

404.description: Guardian invitation could not be found

post.summary: Revoke guardian consent for a teen account
post.description: Revokes one guardian-to-teen consent link, queues a teen notification, invalidates the teen access state when no active guardian remains, and records an audit entry.

401.description: Authentication headers are missing or invalid

403.description: Authenticated guardian does not match the requested guardianId

404.description: Active guardian consent could not be found

post.description: Captures moderation actions for analytics, policy tracking, and downstream review workflows.

403.description: Authenticated moderator does not match moderatorId

get.description: Returns profile metadata plus guardian/teen consent links for authenticated dashboards.

404.description: Authenticated user could not be found

get.summary: Get latest weather for a canonical location
get.description: Returns the latest normalized weather snapshot and freshness outcome for an authenticated request.

200.description: Latest weather freshness result returned successfully

403.description: Guardian consent is required for teen access
